narrative:
Precinct Clear Creek (precinct in Ashland County) has 1,295 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.7 percentage points.
